name: CloudTrail not configured as multi-region trail
description: The CloudTrail trail is not a multi-region trail. Single-region trails miss API activity in other regions, leaving blind spots that attackers can exploit by operating in unmonitored regions.
remediation: Update the trail to be multi-region: aws cloudtrail update-trail --name <trail> --is-multi-region-trail --include-global-service-events. Ensure global service events (IAM, STS, CloudFront) are included.
